content.full_text:
MEMO

DATE: September 1, 1988
FROM: Bruce Robeck
RE: Telephone advice

Received a telephone inquiry from Rosario (?) Estrada, Treasurer for a measure committee in Stockton.

The Committee received a nonmonetary contribution from Randi Meyers, chair of the measure committee. She paid petition circulators directly from her personal funds.

Q: How is the contribution reported?
A: Based on previous telephone advice, the measure committee should list Randi Meyers as the contributor on Schedule C (Nonmonetary contributions received) and list each of the persons (name and address and amount) who received $100 or more during the qualification period. (Jeanne concurred in this advice.)
